channel.title: Robin Flygare | Software developer
channel.description: Recent content on Robin Flygare | Software developer

item.title: Minopt
item.description: Microservice architecture vs. monolithic architecture Scala project made to test performance differences between monolithic and microservices-based systems for our bachelor thesis. Made together with Anthon Holmqvist The Bachelor thesis at Blekinge Institute of Technoloy can be found here and the project here.

item.title: Orcd
item.description: orcD, or Operational Rated CDR Dashboard is a proof of concept to visualize rated CDR’s on a heat and world map. It includes a HeatMap for visualizing CDR’s that has gone through some rating/billing system which has a product tied to it. The GeoMap visualizes rated CDR’s which has a roaming status in the record. The project was made at the request of Qvantel and was later made open source.

item.title: Robin Flygare
item.description: Fullstack developer currently located in Växjö, Sweden
